targets.name: simple bird
targets.executor_readability_notes: Simple silhouette is paired with bird-base landmarks that expose midpoint and diagonal fold cues.

targets.name: simple fish
targets.executor_readability_notes: Simple fish target maps to visible fish-base tail/body landmarks for a one-step executor action flow.

targets.name: simple flower
targets.executor_readability_notes: Radial flower shape maps to waterbomb center and petal midpoint landmarks.

targets.name: simple boat
targets.executor_readability_notes: Boat target uses kite-base mast/hull landmarks and includes the two-finger-gripper optional profile path.

targets.name: simple star
targets.executor_readability_notes: Star target maps to frog-base point and center landmarks for structured checks and failure modes.
